title: Aimless Additions
description: A Mod That Adds Random Items With No Main Theme.
body:
ABANDONED PROJECT! I AM NOT WORKING ON THIS ANYMORE

 

Char1ie's Expanded Vanilla aims to add features that feel like they would be added into vanilla Minecraft in a future update, or features that should already be in the game! Currently only 1.19.4 is made but I will expand to other versions later on. Comments are appreciated, so are suggestions. CLIENT AND SERVER SIDE!

| Forge 1.19.4?  | Forge Other Versions? | Fabric?                                   |
|---------------|------------------------|----------------------------|
| Available.        | No       | No|

FEATURES:

- Neon Block.
- Coloured Neon Blocks (All Colours Except Black).
- Pastel Neon Blocks (All Colours Except White, LightGrey, Grey and Black).
- Tint (Turn Neon Blocks To Their Pastel Colours).
- Gold Bars.
- Steel (Axe, Pickaxe, Block and Raw).
- New Music Discs (No Escape, Gilded and The Ender Dragon) All Made By T_en_M and Laudividni.
- Pink Mushroom + Pink Mushroom Block.
- Mossy Stone
- Mossy Cobbled Deepslate (Mossy Deepslate Coming Soon)
- Diorite and Granite Bricks + Mossy Versions + Slabs and Stairs
- Windowless Doors
- Crates For All Wood Types (36 Slots)
- Spectral Potion (I CAN'T REMOVE THE TIPPED ARROW)
 

 

A Bunch More Planned Features Coming Soon!

 

Theme of next update: Secret Doors

 

Recommended to use JEI

 

 

Full credits to T_en_M and Laudividni For The Music Discs!

 

 

If you want to use this in a modpack please credit me in the description of the mod!
